user.title: Set up Mise en Place Assistant
user.description: Track what is physically prepped, where it lives, whether storage is safe, and what kitchen action should happen next. Mealie owns recipes, Grocy owns stock, KitchenOwl owns shopping, and Home Assistant owns sensors and automations.

mealie_entry.title: Connect Mealie
mealie_entry.description: Choose the Mealie integration that owns recipes, foods, and meal-planning context.

mealie_manual.title: Connect Mealie
mealie_manual.description: No Home Assistant Mealie integration is configured. Enter connection details for the recipe and food provider.

grocy_manual.title: Connect Grocy
grocy_manual.description: Enter Grocy connection details for durable stock, products, units, storage locations, expiry, and minimum-stock policy.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Mise en Place Assistant is already configured.

error.invalid_mealie_connection: Enter a valid Mealie URL and API token.
error.invalid_provider_connection: Enter valid credentials for each selected live provider.
error.provider_required: Choose a data provider or enable DEV mode for mock data.

init.title: Mise en Place Assistant options
init.description: Adjust provider connections, DEV mode, and shopping targets.
